caption: The video features Rishi Yadav, CEO of InfoObjects, speaking at an event called Big Data SV 2015, sponsored by InfoObjects and associated with TheCube. He is seated in front of a backdrop displaying logos for the event and sponsors. Rishi is dressed in a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt and appears to be engaged in a conversation or interview. He gestures with his hands as he speaks, indicating that he is explaining or emphasizing points related to the topic of big data. A laptop and a water bottle are placed on the table in front of him, suggesting a professional and prepared setting for the discussion. The overall atmosphere conveys a formal yet interactive session focused on industry insights and innovations.
